title: astragalus coluteocarpus
intro: Astragalus coluteocarpus, also known as Chinese milk vetch or Huang Qi in traditional Chinese medicine, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used for centuries in medicinal preparations due to its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote balance in the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus coluteocarpus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve overall well-being, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and teas. Astragalus coluteocarpus can be prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
